highlights.text: Serial code CH-019 | TRAGUIN tour code TG-CH-019-TAJ
State / Country: Chandigarh / India | Category: Luxury Weekend
Ideal for: Couples, Corporate & Discerning Travelers
Best season: Year-Round (October to March preferred)
02 Nights ultra-luxury accommodation at Taj Chandigarh
TRAGUIN Signature Experience: Private reserved sunset cruise across Sukhna Lake followed by gourmet high-tea
Shopping: Sector 17 Plaza, Phulkari handicrafts, gourmet dining at Dera and Black Lotus

itinerary.title: Taj Chandigarh Premium Stay Experience
itinerary.tagline: Rock Garden • Rose Garden • Sukhna Lake Luxury Cruise
itinerary.overview:
Welcome to the masterfully planned "Beautiful City" of India. This premium luxury proposal, artfully designed by TRAGUIN holiday planners, presents a flawless 2-Night getaway centered around the legendary hospitality of Taj Chandigarh. Perfect for discerning guests seeking immersive experiences, this holiday effortlessly blends the iconic attractions of Le Corbusier's architectural marvel with premium stays and scenic beauty.

Travel Dates / Format: Fully Customized Luxury FIT Proposal. Vehicle: Chauffeur-driven Premium Luxury Sedan. Meal Plan: Modified American Plan (Gourmet Breakfast & Elaborate Dinner at Taj). TRAGUIN Curated Touch: Reserved sunset shikara/boat cruise at Sukhna Lake, private guided monument walk, and priority access check-ins.
itinerary.seo_title: CH-019 | Taj Chandigarh Premium Stay Experience | TRAGUIN
itinerary.seo_description: Luxury 02 Nights / 03 Days Taj stay package (CH-019 / TG-CH-019-TAJ): Sukhna Lake sunset cruise, Rock Garden, Rose Garden, Jiva Spa leisure, and 4-tier hotel options.

highlights.text: Sukhna Lake Private Sunset Boat Cruise
Nek Chand Rock Garden & Rose Garden Tour
Taj Chandigarh Premium Luxury Room Stay
Sector 17 Open-Air Plaza or Elante Mall Transit

days.title: Arrival in Chandigarh & Sunset Sukhna Cruise
days.description: Your ultimate luxury getaway begins the moment you step foot in the city. You will be greeted with a warm welcome at Chandigarh Airport or Chandigarh Railway Station by our professional chauffeur. Transfer immediately in your premium luxury sedan to the iconic Taj Chandigarh. Your private vehicle will chauffeur you to the scenic Sukhna Lake for an exclusive, private sunset boat ride arranged by TRAGUIN.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Sukhna Lake Lakefront Walk, Private Boat Cruise
Evening Experience: Luxury lakeside high-tea and sunset photography
Overnight Stay: Taj Chandigarh (Premium Luxury Room)
Meals Included: Welcome Buffet Dinner at Black Lotus / Dera

days.title: The Magic of Rock Garden & Botanical Rose Garden Tour
days.description: Awaken to a lavish, curated breakfast at Cafe 17. Our first destination is Nek Chand's world-renowned Rock Garden. Next, enjoy a brief drive to the beautiful Zakir Hussain Rose Garden, Asia's largest botanical rose sanctuary. In the evening, explore the upscale Sector 17 market plaza for exclusive premium shopping before returning to the Taj for a signature dining experience.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Nek Chand's Rock Garden, Zakir Hussain Rose Garden
Optional Activities: Guided architectural walk at the Capitol Complex
Meals Included: Gourmet Breakfast & Chef's Special Farewell Dinner

days.title: Luxury Spa Retreat & Departure with Memories
days.description: Indulge in a luxurious late morning breakfast at the hotel. Today is yours to relax and experience the premium indoor amenities of Taj Chandigarh. We highly recommend treating yourself to an immersive therapeutic massage at the award-winning Jiva Spa. After checking out from your room at noon, your private vehicle will be ready for departure to the airport or station.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Sector 17 open-air plaza or luxury mall transit
Assistance: Complete executive handling up to the departure lounge

hotels.name: Taj Chandigarh / Sukhvilas Luxury Suites
hotels.description: Option 04 — Ultra Luxury tier handpicked property.

inclusions.text: 02 Nights ultra-luxury accommodation at Taj Chandigarh
Lavish daily breakfast spread and curated multi-course dinners at Taj signature restaurants
Private dedicated luxury sedan/SUV transfers throughout your stay
All monumental entry tickets, priority parking passes, and private boat fees at Sukhna Lake
Complimentary welcome amenities, fresh flowers, and fresh seasonal fruit basket upon arrival
24/7 dedicated TRAGUIN customer support and on-ground travel concierge
Full taxes, fuel charges, toll payments, and chauffeur allowances
Inter-city airfare, flight charges, or train tickets to Chandigarh
Personal expenses such as telephone calls, laundry, or premium mini-bar items
Spa therapies, salon treatments, or specialized dynamic body massages at Jiva Spa
Camera or professional video fees at heritage sites
Travel and personal medical insurance plans
